name: Pull-up
description: Bodyweight vertical pull targeting lats, biceps, and upper back; grip width alters emphasis.

name: Chin-up
description: Underhand grip pull-up emphasizing biceps and lower lats more than standard pull-up.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Machine-based vertical pull mimicking pull-up; great for controlled lat development.

name: Wide-Grip Lat Pulldown
description: Wider grip emphasizes upper lats and teres major for broader back appearance.

name: Close-Grip Lat Pulldown
description: Narrow grip targets lower lats and increases biceps involvement.

name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
description: Isolation movement keeping arms straight to target lats with minimal biceps involvement.

name: Barbell Row
description: Bent-over horizontal row using barbell to build thickness in mid-back and lats.

name: Pendlay Row
description: Explosive barbell row from floor to chest, resetting each rep for power and strict form.

name: Dumbbell Row
description: Unilateral row allowing full range of motion and addressing muscle imbalances.

name: Seated Cable Row
description: Cable-based horizontal row with multiple handle options to target mid-back and lats.

name: T-Bar Row
description: Angled rowing movement using T-bar or landmine setup for heavy mid-back loading.

name: Chest-Supported Row
description: Row performed lying prone on incline bench to eliminate momentum and isolate mid-back.

name: Inverted Row
description: Bodyweight horizontal row under a bar or rings; scalable by adjusting body angle.

name: Deadlift
description: Full posterior chain compound lift targeting spinal erectors, glutes, hamstrings, and traps.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Hip-hinge movement emphasizing hamstrings and spinal erectors with minimal knee bend.

name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
description: Similar to RDL but with straighter legs to increase hamstring and lower back stretch.

name: Rack Pull
description: Partial deadlift from pins or rack to overload top portion and build trap/lower back strength.

name: Shrugs
description: Elevates shoulders to target upper traps; can be done with barbell, dumbbells, or machine.

name: Face Pull
description: Cable row to the face targeting rear delts, rhomboids, and improving shoulder health.

name: Reverse Fly (Bent-Over or Machine)
description: Horizontal abduction targeting rear delts and rhomboids for upper back thickness.

name: Single-Arm Lat Pulldown
description: Unilateral pulldown for correcting imbalances and increasing mind-muscle connection.

name: Meadows Row
description: Landmine unilateral row emphasizing mid-back and lats with unique leverage.

name: Kroc Row
description: High-rep, heavy dumbbell row with body English to build mass and grip strength.

name: Snatch-Grip Deadlift
description: Wide-grip deadlift increasing upper back and trap engagement through greater range.

name: Good Morning
description: Hip hinge with barbell on back to target spinal erectors and hamstrings; advanced movement.

name: Hyperextension (Back Extension)
description: Isolates spinal erectors and glutes on a Roman chair or 45° bench.
